name: Chocolate Mousse Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chocolate, brandy and 2 tablespoons water in a medium bowl and set over nearly simmering water. Stir until smooth. Remove from the water.
2. Stir in butter until blended. Let cool.
3. In a small metal bowl, whisk egg yolks with sugar and remaining 4 tablespoons water. Set bowl in a pan of nearly simmering water. Heat, whisking constantly, until the mixture reaches 160°F on an instant-read or candy thermometer, about 1 minute.
4. Immediately remove from the water and whisk until cool. Stir into the chocolate mixture.
5. Whip cream in a large, chilled bowl until nearly stiff. Gently fold into the chocolate mixture.
6. Divide mousse among 6 or 7 ramekins or dessert glasses. Cover and refrigerate for 3 hours before serving.
